commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

arguments.name: PACK
arguments.description:
Creates a new .ptix package using specified metadata and
source directory.

arguments.name: METADATA_GEN
arguments.description:
Generates a metadata.json and a contentsmetadata.json file
from the specified plugin source directory.

arguments.name: HELP
arguments.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: metadata-gen
commands.description:
Generates a metadata.json and a contentsmetadata.json file
from the specified plugin source directory.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Directory where the metadata file(s) will be created. If
not specified, the current directory will be used.

options.name: --source
options.description: The directory containing the plugin binaries.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Indicates that the destination file should be overwritten
if it already exists.

options.name: --manifest
options.description:
Path to the plugin manifest file. If not specified, the
tool searches the source directory for file named
pluginManifest.json

commands.name: pack
commands.description:
Creates a new .ptix package using specified metadata and
source directory.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The path to the output package file. If not specified, a
file will be created in the current directory.

options.name: --source
options.description: The directory containing the plugin binaries.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Indicates that the destination file should be overwritten
if it already exists.

options.name: --manifest
options.description:
Path to the plugin manifest file. If not specified, the
tool searches the source directory for file named
pluginManifest.json
